title: just impossible
description: this mod can be impossible,  that make minecraft much harder then some mods but this mod is the odd one out then other challenge mods. more about the mod in the description
body:
This is a mod for people that want a little more of a challenge. This Mod can be little cursed sometimes. If you are use my Mod for a video please link to my Channel and Mod in the discerption [https://www.youtube.com/@warmaker_yt]. (If you have questions about this Mod or any Mod i have made go to https://discord.com/invite/ajMEAzbqRc) 



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/S478scIBKm8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

If your a YouTuber/Twitch streamer I recommend you not look at the Contents of the Mod untill you complete the Mod first but I will not stop you.

(Status:Unbeaten)

WARNING: THIS MOD CAN BE VARY LAGGY FOR WEAK COMPUTERS IN OLDER VERSIONS OF THE MOD.

CONTENT YOU MIGHT WHANT TO KNOW


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

When you leave a world your inventory get cleared


</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Space gem you need this to beat my mod 

![the space gem recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/525e22a9f5194df66d8d99297061788ec5897f3f.png)

</details>



CONTENTS OF THE MOD


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Grass explodes

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Mining with anything disappears 

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Beds turns in to lava in a 5 by 5 area

</details>





<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Water turns to lava in a 10 by 10 area


</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

When you get a item from the ground you have 5 sec before your entire inventory get's cleared.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

If you place a block does not mater if it 1 or 64 use all your blocks to place just 1.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You are all ways in Hardcore

</details>
